description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rich, polished brown finish. The upper section features two hinged doors with round metallic knobs, opening to reveal an interior compartment. Below the doors, there are three spacious drawers, each equipped with horizontal metallic handles for easy access. The cabinet stands on a slightly flared base, providing stability and a classic silhouette. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a warm and traditional appearance. All visible surfaces are smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the quality of the finish.
description: A polished brown wooden cabinet with two upper doors and three lower drawers, featuring metallic handles and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth, the thickness of the wood, and partially open drawers and door.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two upper doors, three drawers with metallic handles, and the overall symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the cabinet's profile and open compartments.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a flat, uninterrupted wooden back panel with no visible handles or openings.
